accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and the CRA context is accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: The reference to the Congressional Review Act is correct context, not a fabrication.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution disapproves a DOE rule on gas-fired water heater standards.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Explains the rule is nullified under chapter 8 of title 5 and has no force or effect.

exceptions_conditions.why: The resolution contains no material exceptions or conditions to note.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes the approval date of May 9, 2025.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the essential operative effect of disapproving and nullifying the rule.

objective_tone.why: Tone is neutral and factual with no editorializing.

coherent.why: The summary is well-organized and reads clearly.

concise.why: The summary is appropriately brief with no filler.

correct_entities.why: Department of Energy, Federal Register citation, and CRA are all correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: The Federal Register citation, publication date, and approval date are all correct.
